headline: Air Products Cocoa ASU Expands Core Gases And Tests Growth Balance
summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) plans to build a new air separation unit in Cocoa, Florida. The plant is expected to supply liquid oxygen, nitrogen, and argon for industrial customers in the southeastern U.S. The new Cocoa facility reflects an expansion of Air Products and Chemicals' core industrial gases business, alongside its widely discussed hydrogen projects. For investors, it indicates that the company is still allocating capital to traditional products that serve manufacturing,...
